Get Started
Browser · Node.js · Python · OpenTelemetry · Zero Cloud

Debug your full stack
with AI.

Mergen connects your browser, backend services, and any OpenTelemetry-instrumented service into one local MCP server. Your AI IDE sees live console errors, backend spans, OTLP traces, and source-mapped stacks — all correlated end-to-end. Snapshot debugging, dynamic logpoints, PII masking. Everything on 127.0.0.1.

Get Started — 2 min
npx mergen-setup
Chrome Extensionmergen-nodemergen-pythonOTLP :4318MCP ServerSnapshot DebuggerPII ShieldDevcontainers
mergen — status
01 // How It Works

Every signal.
One local server.

mergen-node

claude mcp add mergen

02 // Capabilities

Enterprise-grade.
Zero config.

01

Snapshot Debugging

Set a breakpoint condition. When it fires, Mergen captures the complete state in under 10ms — last 20 console events, 10 network events, localStorage, and component tree. Download the bundle and replay offline in your IDE. No live debugger, no paused threads.

02

Dynamic Logpoints

Inject ad-hoc console statements into any running page via MCP — no restart, no redeployment. Attach to any DOM element, fire on any event, evaluate any JS expression. Results stream back within seconds as standard console events.

03

OTLP Native

Point any OpenTelemetry SDK at localhost:4318 and Mergen ingests spans and logs automatically. Go, Java, Ruby, .NET — any language, zero Mergen-specific code. Server spans become backend_span events; logs become console events.

04

Deterministic Trace Joins

W3C traceparent links every browser fetch to its exact backend span with 100% certainty. Your AI calls get_correlated_trace and sees the full round-trip: browser request → server route → log lines — no inference, no guessing.

05

PII Shield

Client-side entity detection scans events for JWTs, API keys, emails, and secrets before they reach the ring buffer. The popup shows per-entity toggle overrides — you decide what gets masked. The translation table lives in-memory only, never written to disk.

06

Local Sovereignty

Every byte stays on 127.0.0.1. No cloud backend, no accounts, no data leaving your machine. Devcontainer templates include an attachable Traefik proxy so teams can mirror production routing locally — zero port conflicts.

03 // Integrations

Plug in anything.
Works immediately.

Start local.
Scale to enterprise.

Developer
$0/mo
  • 500 reasoning calls / month
  • Chrome extension + browser capture
  • Snapshot debugging (50 captures)
  • PII Shield — client-side masking
  • Standard MCP tools

Solo Pro
$29/mo
  • Unlimited reasoning calls

  • OTLP receiver — any OTel service
  • Dynamic logpoints + trace correlation
  • Devcontainer templates + Traefik ingress

Enterprise
Custom
  • Air-gapped OTLP pipeline
